name: Viva Leisure Limited
analysis: VVA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5700, stop A$1.4751, target A$1.7450 (1.84:1) — then trail it.
